elements.text:
You are looking after a friend's child and you're watching TV while they sleep. It's dark outside and you suddenly hear noises against the window. 

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I pull out a new book and start reading.
I want to wake up the child and ask if they hear anything, but instead let my anxiety pass.
I want to leave the house, but decide to stay.
I make some popcorn and turn on the TV.
I call the friend to come home immediately.
